Argument Reference

  • connection_configuration - (updatable)
  • default_backend_set_name - (updatable)
  • hostname_names - (updatable)
  • path_route_set_name - (updatable)
  • port - (updatable)
  • protocol - (updatable)
  • routing_policy_name - (updatable)
  • rule_set_names - (updatable)
  • ssl_configuration - (updatable)
  • load_balancer_id - forces a new resource
  • name - forces a new resource
